title: Croatian Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful stir fry recipe with a mix of Croatian and Asian influences.

ingredients.name: Silky Tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

ingredients.name: Fresh Herbs
ingredients.notes: such as parsley, dill, or cilantro

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and ginger and stir-fry for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced red bell pepper and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until tender.
Add the Croatian paprika and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the silky tofu and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until coated with the paprika mixture.
Add the fresh herbs and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Season with light soy sauce to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Garnish with additional fresh herbs, if desired.
